name: Faux Raffia Floor Lamp Brown (Includes LED Light Bulb) - Opalhouse™ designed with Jungalow: Modern Boho Style, UL Listed, Empire Shade
description: Uplift your lighting style with this Faux Raffia Floor Lamp from Opalhouse™ designed with Jungalow™. This decorative floor lamp complete with a unique tiered base and an empire shade showcases a faux raffia-textured construction for natural appeal that coordinates with a variety of aesthetics. The on/off light setting with a socket turn knob rotary switch allows for easy operation. Place it next to a sofa in your living room or lounge room to beautifully light up your space.
